nasb.text: Jesus *said to her, “Did I not say to you that if you believe, you will see the glory of God?”

esv.text: Jesus said to her, “Did I not tell you that if you believed you would see the glory of God?”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“我不是對你說過‘如果你信，就必定看見　神的榮耀’嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我不是跟你说过，只要你信，就会看见上帝的荣耀吗？”

csbs.text: 耶稣对她说：“我不是对你说过，你如果信，就会看见神的荣耀吗？”
